ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mutation_types" (
  "mutation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation type */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of mutation (e.g., C>A, C>G) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mutation type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_subtypes" (
  "mutation_subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation subtype */,
  "subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of mutation (e.g., ACA, ACC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mutation subtype */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genome_builds" (
  "genome_build_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genome build */,
  "build_name" TEXT /* Name of the genome build (e.g., GRCh37) */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species the genome build is for (e.g., Human, Mouse) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genome build */,
  "assembly_date" TEXT /* Date the genome build was assembled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genome_build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency entry */,
  "mutation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation type */,
  "mutation_subtype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation subtype */,
  "genome_build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genome build */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the mutation */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the frequency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_frequencies_mutation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_type_id") REFERENCES mutation_types ("mutation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_frequencies_genome_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("genome_build_id") REFERENCES genome_builds ("genome_build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_frequencies_mutation_subtype_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_subtype_id") REFERENCES mutation_subtypes ("mutation_subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency entry being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., gene, region) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation (e.g., gene name, chromosomal region) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES mutation_frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_metrics" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency entry being measured */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric (e.g., coverage, depth) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_metrics_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES mutation_frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES mutation_frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., PI, co-investigator, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., 1000 Genomes Project, TCGA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source link */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES mutation_frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., VCF, BAM) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES mutation_frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency entry */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., v1.0, v2.0) */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES mutation_frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator in the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency entry */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of documentation (e.g., methods, processing) */,
  "doc_value" TEXT /* Value of the documentation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES mutation_frequencies ("frequency_id")
)
